_instructions: Assign publications to projects by adding project IDs to the 'projects' array. Publications are fetched automatically from ORCID, this file just tags them. Titles should match or be substrings of ORCID titles.

_matching_note: The system matches by DOI (exact) or title (substring). You can use partial titles like 'FIRe glider' to match 'FIRe glider: Mapping in situ...'
_how_to_use: Add relevant project IDs to the 'projects' array for each publication. The ORCID integration will automatically fetch all publications and match them by DOI or title substring.
